test-case.description: exports collector functions from the module
test-case.name: Module entry points.exports collector functions from the module

test-case.description: wrapper script loads the module in no-run mode
test-case.name: Module entry points.wrapper script loads the module in no-run mode

test-case.description: prints a final delivery summary for successful and failed nodes
test-case.name: Invoke-CollectNodeMetricsMain.prints a final delivery summary for successful and failed nodes

test-case.description: parses valid line protocol
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-MeasurementOutput.parses valid line protocol

test-case.description: parses valid line protocol when banner text is present
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-MeasurementOutput.parses valid line protocol when banner text is present

test-case.description: returns null for invalid payload
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-MeasurementOutput.returns null for invalid payload

test-case.description: parses final failed speedtest markers with zero throughput
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-MeasurementOutput.parses final failed speedtest markers with zero throughput

test-case.description: returns null for empty payload
test-case.name: ConvertFrom-MeasurementOutput.returns null for empty payload

test-case.description: finds Excel and CSV files recursively
test-case.name: Resolve-NodeSourceFiles.finds Excel and CSV files recursively

test-case.description: builds deterministic test nodes from configured IPs
test-case.name: Get-TestNodesFromConfig.builds deterministic test nodes from configured IPs

test-case.description: handles epoch seconds from nodes
test-case.name: Convert-NodeTimestampToUtc.handles epoch seconds from nodes

test-case.description: handles nanoseconds
test-case.name: Convert-NodeTimestampToUtc.handles nanoseconds

test-case.description: stops early when all nodes are finished
test-case.name: Wait-WithProgress.stops early when all nodes are finished

test-case.description: keeps updating elapsed time while the poll is still running
test-case.name: Wait-WithProgress.keeps updating elapsed time while the poll is still running

test-case.description: polls only the remaining nodes after a successful update
test-case.name: Wait-WithProgress.polls only the remaining nodes after a successful update

test-case.description: keeps the last finished count when a later poll fails
test-case.name: Wait-WithProgress.keeps the last finished count when a later poll fails

test-case.description: returns poll results and removes the finished job
test-case.name: Receive-NodeResultCountPoll.returns poll results and removes the finished job

test-case.description: accepts 1.5.0 and newer releases
test-case.name: Test-NodeReleaseSupported.accepts 1.5.0 and newer releases

test-case.description: rejects empty, invalid, and older releases
test-case.name: Test-NodeReleaseSupported.rejects empty, invalid, and older releases

test-case.description: imports only nodes with IP and release 1.5.0 or newer from csv
test-case.name: Import-NodeListFromExcel.imports only nodes with IP and release 1.5.0 or newer from csv

test-case.description: spreads unknown and slow nodes across the beginning of the delay window
test-case.name: Get-NodeTriggerAssignments.spreads unknown and slow nodes across the beginning of the delay window

test-case.description: does not assign all-unknown nodes to delay 0
test-case.name: Get-NodeTriggerAssignments.does not assign all-unknown nodes to delay 0

test-case.description: triggers lower assigned delays first
test-case.name: Invoke-NodeTriggerBatch.triggers lower assigned delays first

test-case.description: uses controller-assigned delay and target settings
test-case.name: Get-NodeTriggerCommandInfo.uses controller-assigned delay and target settings

test-case.description: streams a remote measurement file from one configured test node over SSH
test-case.name: SSH streaming integration.streams a remote measurement file from one configured test node over SSH

failure.message: RuntimeException: No configured test node completed the ssh-streaming test. 2a03:2260:3013:200:7a8a:20ff:fed0:747a: prepare failed: Warning: Identity file /home/dev/.ssh/id_rsa not accessible: No such file or directory. root@2a03:2260:3013:200:7a8a:20ff:fed0:747a: Permission denied (publickey,password). | 2a03:2260:3013:200:1ae8:29ff:fe5c:1ff8: prepare failed: Warning: Identity file /home/dev/.ssh/id_rsa not accessible: No such file or directory. root@2a03:2260:3013:200:1ae8:29ff:fe5c:1ff8: Permission denied (publickey,password).

test-case.description: downloads the configured speedtest file with the expected length
test-case.name: Speedtest target integration.downloads the configured speedtest file with the expected length

test-case.description: normalizes valid config values
test-case.name: Assert-ValidConfig.normalizes valid config values

test-case.description: rejects invalid speedtest url schemes
test-case.name: Assert-ValidConfig.rejects invalid speedtest url schemes

test-case.description: rejects non-positive collect parallelism
test-case.name: Assert-ValidConfig.rejects non-positive collect parallelism

test-case.description: parses multiple streamed remote files
test-case.name: Convert-CollectStreamToFiles.parses multiple streamed remote files

test-case.description: keeps downloaded measurements when remote delete fails
test-case.name: Receive-NodeResults.keeps downloaded measurements when remote delete fails

test-case.description: treats final failed results as collected measurements
test-case.name: Receive-NodeResults.treats final failed results as collected measurements

test-case.description: builds a run-specific remote directory
test-case.name: Get-RemoteRunResultDir.builds a run-specific remote directory

test-case.description: counts nodes with finished remote result files
test-case.name: Get-FinishedNodeResultCountBatch.counts nodes with finished remote result files

test-case.description: collects multiple nodes in parallel
test-case.name: Invoke-NodeCollectBatch.collects multiple nodes in parallel
